issues.title: Zero schema.org markup sitewide
issues.detail: No JSON-LD detected on any of the 14 pages analyzed including homepage, /prior-auth, /tech, /blog, /risa-api-hub, /innercircle, and all blog posts. Organization, SoftwareApplication, Article, FAQPage, and Person schema are all absent.
issues.fix: Add Organization schema to homepage footer. Add SoftwareApplication to /prior-auth and /risa-api-hub. Add Article/BlogPosting to all blog posts. Add FAQPage to /prior-auth.

issues.title: No llms.txt file
issues.detail: https://risalabs.ai/llms.txt returns HTTP 404. AI systems crawling the site have no structured manifest of the company, products, or authoritative content. All competing SaaS platforms with llms.txt gain a structural citation advantage.
issues.fix: Create /public/llms.txt with company summary, product descriptions, and links to all key pages (/prior-auth, /tech, /risa-api-hub, /blog posts, /innercircle, Series A announcement).

issues.title: Blog posts are abstract-only (200-250 words)
issues.detail: All 5 research/blog posts are abstract-length. 'Advancing Healthcare Automation' and 'Digital Twin Ecosystem' are each 200-250 words. AI systems cannot quote or cite content that does not exist on the page. The research referenced (ACL Anthology, arXiv) is not surfaced in the post body.
issues.fix: Expand each research post to full article (1,500+ words minimum). Include the actual paper content, methodology, and findings. Add author bios with credentials.

issues.title: Author bios missing on all blog posts
issues.detail: All posts credit Kshitij Jaggi but the author bio section is empty across all 3 verified posts. No credentials, no LinkedIn link, no photo.
issues.fix: Add 50-100 word author bio with credentials (Co-founder & CEO, IIT background, arXiv/ACL publications) and Person schema markup.

issues.title: No About or Team page
issues.detail: Sitemap contains 57 URLs but no /about or /team page. Navigation does not include an About link. AI systems cannot establish a complete entity record for RISA Labs without an authoritative About page.
issues.fix: Create /about with co-founder bios (Kshitij Jaggi, Kumar Shivang), founding story, funding history ($3.5M seed + $11.1M Series A), investor names, and embed Organization schema.

issues.title: No FAQPage schema on /prior-auth
issues.detail: The /prior-auth page contains implicit Q&A content (payer coverage, approval rates, implementation timeline) but no explicit FAQ format and no FAQPage schema. This is the highest-citability schema type for AI Overview inclusion.
issues.fix: Add 6-8 explicit Q&A blocks visible on the page and mark up with FAQPage + Question + Answer JSON-LD.

issues.title: No Wikipedia article
issues.detail: Wikipedia API search for 'RISA Labs oncology' returns zero relevant results. Wikipedia is a primary training and citation source for all major AI models. Entities without Wikipedia pages are significantly less likely to be described accurately by AI.
issues.fix: Draft a Wikipedia article meeting notability requirements. RISA Labs qualifies: $11.1M Series A from Cencora + Optum Ventures, AJMC coverage, HIT Consultant, Healthcare IT Today, BioSpace, PR Newswire.

issues.title: robots.txt does not explicitly allow AI crawlers
issues.detail: robots.txt contains only a Sitemap directive with no User-agent rules. Default behavior allows all crawlers, but explicit Allow rules for GPTBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended signal intentional openness.
issues.fix: Add explicit Allow: / directives for GPTBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Bingbot.

issues.title: Staging page /home-3 in public sitemap with Webflow template content
issues.detail: https://www.risalabs.ai/home-3 is in the public sitemap and returns a Webflow template page with fictional hardware product specs ('The CPX-9,' '8.6gbps throughput,' '$3,499 per engagement'). This dilutes crawl budget and confuses AI systems.
issues.fix: Add noindex meta tag to /home-3 and remove from sitemap.xml immediately.

issues.title: No Reddit presence in any relevant subreddit
issues.detail: Search for RISA Labs on Reddit returns zero results. Reddit is a major AI training data source. Brands discussed on Reddit appear more frequently in AI responses to comparative product questions.
issues.fix: Engage authentically in r/healthIT, r/oncology, r/healthcare_technology with value-first content answering questions relevant to prior authorization and oncology workflows.

issues.title: Metric inconsistencies across pages
issues.detail: Homepage references '30% touchless' and '70% FTE reclaimed.' /prior-auth lists '97% first submission success' and '70% FTE.' Other contexts cite '95%+' first-submit and '75% FTE reduction.' AI systems encountering contradictory statistics reduce confidence in citing any of them.
issues.fix: Lock canonical metric values sitewide. Audit every page and update to consistent numbers. Maintain a single source of truth document internally.

issues.title: No Open Graph or Twitter Card meta tags detected
issues.detail: Homepage fetch returned no OG or Twitter meta tags. Missing OG tags mean poor social previews and less indexed social content for AI training.
issues.fix: Add og:title, og:description, og:image to every page with page-specific descriptions.

issues.title: No public GitHub repositories for core healthcare product
issues.detail: Only GitHub presence found is risa-labs-inc/cursor-auto-continue (a VS Code extension unrelated to the healthcare platform). No public API SDKs, client libraries, or developer tools.
issues.fix: Publish a public GitHub organization for RISA Labs with at least a minimal Python API client SDK. Developer GitHub presence signals technical legitimacy to AI systems.

issues.title: API Hub has no developer documentation
issues.detail: /risa-api-hub describes 4 API products (Auth Status, Medical Necessity, Eligibility, Auth Verification) but has no actual documentation, code samples, authentication guide, or endpoint specifications.
issues.fix: Add a /docs subdomain or /risa-api-hub/docs with basic endpoint documentation, authentication guide, and example requests/responses.

quick_wins: Add Organization JSON-LD schema to homepage footer (30 minutes — immediate entity recognition by all AI crawlers)
Create /llms.txt with company description and links to 10 key pages (2 hours — no-risk, high-upside AI manifest)
Add explicit AI crawler Allow rules to robots.txt for GPTBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended (15 minutes)
Noindex /home-3 and remove from sitemap — staging Webflow template page is publicly indexed with fictional hardware content
Add Article schema + 50-word author bio to the 3 research blog posts (2 hours — highest leverage per time for E-E-A-T)
Add FAQPage schema with 6 Q&A pairs to /prior-auth (3 hours — highest-citability schema type for AI Overviews)
Reconcile metric inconsistencies sitewide — lock one canonical number per KPI across all pages

pages.title: AI Operating System for Oncology Workflow Automation
OneRISA — Medical Auths. Pharmacy Auths. One Platform.
Advancing Healthcare Automation: Multi-Agent System for Medical Necessity Justification
Digital Twin Ecosystem for Oncology Clinical Operations
Evolvable DAGs: The Next Operating System for AI-First Enterprises

strengths: Strong concrete statistics on /prior-auth with industry baselines (97% vs 65% industry avg, 0-day backlog vs 8-day prior, <2 hours turnaround)
4 named executive testimonials with full credentials: Dr. Jeff Vacirca MD FACP, Dr. Edward Licitra, Nirav Shah, Maria Langhorst
10 named customer logos from recognizable oncology practices including OneOncology (largest US community oncology network)
Strong trust/compliance stack: HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, HITECH — all clearly displayed
CEO-authored research blog posts with ACL Anthology and arXiv citations — signals genuine domain expertise
Series A press coverage across high-authority healthcare publications: AJMC, HIT Consultant, Healthcare IT Today, BioSpace, PR Newswire
Crunchbase and LinkedIn company pages active with investment data (Cencora Ventures + Optum Ventures co-lead)
Inner Circle event page with credentialed speakers and documented 'Oncology AI Pledge' — unique thought leadership asset
summary: RISA Labs scores 48/100 (D) in GEO readiness, primarily because zero schema.org markup exists across all 14 pages analyzed and no llms.txt has been deployed, making the site's strong underlying content invisible to AI citation systems. The /prior-auth page contains the site's highest-quality GEO content — 8 precise statistics with industry baselines and 4 named executive testimonials — but this value cannot be extracted by AI without FAQPage and SoftwareApplication schema. Fixing schema, creating llms.txt, and expanding the 200-word blog abstracts to full articles would realistically lift the composite score above 65 within 30 days.
